findings.title: Potential hardcoded credential detected (inline secret assignment)
findings.evidence: Matched inline secret assignment pattern in .env.
findings.reproduction_steps:
1. Open .env.
2. Review the committed secret-like value.
findings.business_impact: Stored credentials in source remain exposed to anyone with repository access.
findings.remediation: Move credentials to a secret manager and rotate any exposed values.

findings.title: Non-local plaintext HTTP endpoint referenced
findings.cwe: CWE-319: Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information
findings.evidence: Found hardcoded http:// reference in client configuration.
findings.reproduction_steps:
1. Open src/client.js.
2. Review the hardcoded endpoint.
findings.business_impact: Plaintext transport can expose data in transit.
findings.remediation: Migrate the endpoint to HTTPS and reject insecure transport in configuration.
